items.name: Beast bones
items.examine: Bones off something that died mid-howl. The hymn picks up where it left off.

items.name: Drake bones
items.examine: Heavy as a church door and twice as resonant. Quiess hears these from a long way off.

items.name: Tollbone
items.examine: A femur the size of a bell-clapper. Drop it and the whole graveyard takes notice.

items.name: Unsung bones
items.examine: Bones still holding their last note. Bury them properly or they will hold it forever.

items.name: Choir dust
items.examine: Grey ash that hums when you shake the pouch. The Order pays in favours, not coin.

items.name: Censer incense
items.examine: Pressed resin cones, Order issue. Smells of cold chapels and good intentions.

items.name: Holy censer
items.examine: A swinging brazier on a chain. Where its smoke goes, burials count for more.

items.name: Unsung helm
items.examine: A monk's barbute with no visor slit. The dead do not need to see you to respect you.

items.name: Silencer's cowl
items.examine: A grey hood cut so the wearer hears everything and is heard by nothing.

items.name: Silencer's robe
items.examine: Quilted grey vestments of the cull. The stitching spells out a rest, in notation.

items.name: Silencer's greaves
items.examine: Padded leg-wraps. You cannot end a wrong note if it hears you coming.

items.name: Binding chime
items.examine: A hand-bell with its clapper wrapped in lead. Rung once at the start of a cull, by tradition.

items.name: Tome of dirges
items.examine: Cantor Veil's ledger of endings. Every entry is a name, a note, and a line through both.

items.name: Knell brand
items.examine: A bell-bronze blade tuned to a dead stop. Things it cuts stay sung.

spec.name: Last Knell
spec.desc: One tolling blow: 40% more accuracy and 80% more damage. There is no encore.

objs.name: Consecrated altar
objs.examine: An altar tuned by the Order of the Last Verse. Bones buried here ring a fifth truer.

objs.name: Offering brazier
objs.examine: An iron bowl of grey flame. It takes bones and keeps a tally that isn't written anywhere.

objs.name: The Knell
objs.examine: The temple's great bell. Rung once per funeral, twice per cull, never for fun. Officially.

objs.name: Pew
objs.examine: A hard bench facing the altar. Discomfort, the Abbot insists, keeps the pitch honest.

objs.name: Sundered arch
objs.examine: The broken doorway of a cathedral that fell mid-hymn. The draft coming up is in a minor key.

objs.name: Cull brazier
objs.examine: An Order marker-flame. It burns grey over consecrated ground and not at all over the other kind.

npcs.name: Cantor Veil
npcs.examine: The Order's master of the cull. Keeps a list of every wrong note still ringing, alphabetised.

npcs.name: Sister Plainsong
npcs.examine: The Order's quartermaster. Trades in incense, bones and a frankly unsettling cheerfulness.

npcs.name: Abbot Threnody
npcs.examine: Head of the Order of the Last Verse. Has personally sung four hundred dead to rest, twice for emphasis.

npcs.name: Gravewail hound
npcs.examine: A dog that outlived its own funeral and resents the paperwork.

npcs.name: Choir ghast
npcs.examine: A chorister's shape holding a note nobody wrote. It would like you to listen forever.

npcs.name: Dirgewolf
npcs.examine: It howls in perfect descending thirds. The pack it mourns is also here, also dead, also hostile.

npcs.name: Dirge ghoul
npcs.examine: A Discord War soldier still keeping formation. The war ended. Nobody sang him the memo.

npcs.name: Chordwyrm
npcs.examine: A drake the Offnote retuned. Every scale rings a different wrong note, all at once.

npcs.name: Carillon revenant
npcs.examine: It wears the cathedral's bell-frame as armour and tolls itself into battle. Committed, you have to admit.

npcs.name: Choir Warden
npcs.examine: The cathedral's last conductor, still conducting. The orchestra is bones. The tempo is you.

sharedEdits.what: Add the 6 new Sundered Choir monsters to TASK_POOL (~line 166) so Brogan's loop can assign them (pickTask already weights by combat level, so they only roll for appropriately levelled players).
Add the Knell reward tier to the slayer REWARDS record (~line 176) so the slayer 'buy' op honours the new points prices.
Add matching entries (cost + blurb) to the client REWARDS list (~line 30) so Brogan's shop menu shows the new tier; Cantor Veil's pack shows the same items at the Knell.
sharedEdits.snippet:
const REWARDS: RewardEntry[] = [
  { id: 'dirge_blade', cost: 120, blurb: 'My masterwork. Sings the Offnote to sleep — permanently.' },
  { id: 'cull_band', cost: 60, blurb: 'Tally-ring. Hits a little harder for every grudge it remembers.' },
  { id: 'wardens_visor', cost: 50, blurb: 'Half-helm I wore for thirty years of bad ideas.' },
  { id: 'tome_of_grudges', cost: 25, blurb: 'My field notes. Read them once and burn brighter for it.' },
  // prayer-slayer: Cantor Veil's consignment — Brogan stocks it too, grudgingly.
  { id: 'binding_chime', cost: 35, blurb: 'Order hand-bell. Rings once, and the quarry forgets how to duck.' },
  { id: 'tome_of_dirges', cost: 60, blurb: 'Veil\'s ledger of endings. Heavier reading than mine.' },
  { id: 'silencers_cowl', cost: 90, blurb: 'Grey hood of the cull. Hears everything, says nothing.' },
  { id: 'silencers_greaves', cost: 100, blurb: 'Padded greaves. Wrong notes never hear them coming.' },
  { id: 'silencers_robe', cost: 120, blurb: 'The cull\'s vestments. Stitched in notation: a rest.' },
  { id: 'knell_brand', cost: 250, blurb: 'Bell-bronze, tuned to a dead stop. The Order\'s last word.' },
];

sharedEdits.what: Wire the new Knell intent domain (side-effect import, next to the other intent imports ~line 41).
sharedEdits.snippet: import './intent-knell'; // side-effect: registers the 'bone-offering' Knell domain (offer/consecrated bury/recharge/token shop)

sharedEdits.what: Wire the Knell content pack (side-effect import, after './slayer_tasks').
sharedEdits.snippet: import './the_knell';              // The Knell temple + Sundered Choir dungeon (prayer hub, Cantor Veil, bone offering)

sharedEdits.what: OPTIONAL (spec: unsung_helm passive): in the prayer drain tick (~line 635, where PRAYER_DRAIN is applied), halve the drain when the unsung helm is worn.
OPTIONAL (spec: Silencer set bonus): in creditSlayerKill, grant +15% Slayer XP on-task when the full Silencer set (cowl+robe+greaves) is equipped.

REQUIRED for the ward prayers to do anything (verdict correction 4): widen the prayer boost union and halve incoming damage client-side when the matching ward is active. In netNpcHitYou (~line 652), before applying dmg: if the attacking npc's style matches an active protect prayer, halve it. Minimal version (all current dungeon monsters are melee):
